name: rarcane-mcp
description: Rust MCP server for Arcane Docker management — manage containers, images, networks, volumes, compose projects, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Docker via the Arcane API
interface.longDescription: MCP server that bridges Codex to the Arcane Docker management API. Exposes a single action-dispatched 'arcane' tool covering environments, compose projects, containers, images, networks, volumes, registries, GitOps repos, image-update checks, vulnerability scanning, and system operations. Supports both read and write operations across Docker environments; destructive subactions (delete, prune, stop, destroy) require explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Arcane and rarcane configuration status.
Check for available image updates across my Docker environment.
